objective: Router folder topology complete with root compatibility facades and implementation subfolders: providers/ for router provider, routes/ for route constants/policies, intents/ for navigation intents. Reused AppRoutes.isNavigationDestinationLocation from shared/widgets/app_shell_presentation.dart for desktop/mobile destination selection instead of duplicated startsWith route prefix checks.
